name: Verpine Shatter Pistol
description: Verpine Shatter Pistol, magnetically-accelerated projectile weapon created by the Verpine, 3d6, 10 squares. Compact, fashionable, and built for conversations that suddenly matter.

name: Verpine Shatter Rifle
description: Verpine Shatter Rifle, magnetically-accelerated rifle created by the Verpine, 4d6, 30 squares. For customers who like their opinions delivered from further away.

name: Verpine Shattergun
description: Verpine Shattergun, silent and deadly Verpine projectile weapon, 3d10, 25 squares. Not standard issue, which is often how you know it will be interesting.

name: Verpine Sniper Rifle
description: Verpine Sniper Rifle, elite long-range variant of Verpine shatter weapons, 4d8, 60 squares. A respectable long arm for anyone who mistakes overprepared for professional.

name: Vibroblade
description: Vibroblade, blade weapon enhanced with ultrasonic vibrations that increase its cutting power, 2d6, melee. A straightforward tool for anyone comfortable standing inside the consequences.

name: Vibrodagger
description: Vibrodagger, small vibroweapon easily concealed, 2d4, melee. Close-quarters honesty for buyers who dislike pretense.

name: Vibrosword
description: Vibrosword, full-length sword enhanced with ultrasonic vibrations, 2d8, melee. A straightforward tool for anyone comfortable standing inside the consequences.

name: Wookiee Ryyk Blade
description: Wookiee Ryyk Blade, curved Wookiee blade with an elegant yet brutal design, 2d8, melee. The kind of weapon purchased by people who intend to be memorable up close.

name: Wrist Blaster
description: Wrist Blaster, concealed wrist-mounted blaster, 3d4, 8 squares. Specialty hardware for buyers with very specific grudges.

name: Wrist Laser
description: Wrist Laser, concealed wrist-mounted laser weapon, 2d6, 10 squares. Not standard issue, which is often how you know it will be interesting.

name: Wrist Rocket Launcher
description: Wrist Rocket Launcher, small wrist-mounted launcher system often used by Mandalorians, varies, 10 squares. Ideal for customers who think one projectile should make a point for everyone nearby.

name: Xerrol Nightstinger
description: Xerrol Nightstinger, sniper rifle used by assassins, 3d6, 30 squares. A niche purchase, but then so is whatever situation this was built for.

name: Zabrak Combat Staff
description: Zabrak Combat Staff, traditional Zabrak quarterstaff used in combat training and martial arts, 1d8, melee. A straightforward tool for anyone comfortable standing inside the consequences.

name: Zeltron Neural Whip
description: Zeltron Neural Whip, specialized whip that targets the nervous system, 1d6, 2 squares. A straightforward tool for anyone comfortable standing inside the consequences.
